title: SRS Document View JSON Projection Output (ext:views-l2)
description: Machine-readable projection produced by rendering a DocumentView with format 'json'. Contains document metadata, ordered sections, and typed record data. Not a rendered markup document.

documentViewId.description: ID of the DocumentView that produced this projection.

containerId.description: Container ID derived from the first ContainerSubset section source. Null when no ContainerSubset source is present in the view.

generatedAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when this projection was generated.

containerTitle.description: Human-readable container title resolved at render time.

preamble.description: Evaluated DocumentView.preamble string. Heading variables ({{heading-N}}) are substituted as empty strings.

recordHeading.description: Value of the titleFieldId field, if the section declares one and the record has it.

preamble.description: Evaluated export_config.preamble for this record. Heading variables substituted as empty strings. Present only when the section's render view has an ExportConfig.preamble.

fields.description: Typed field values keyed by fieldId. Values are raw JSON (string, number, boolean, array, or null). Empty/absent fields are omitted when omitEmptyFields is true.

orderedFieldKeys.description: Field IDs in the effective render order (ExportConfig.fieldOrder or fallback order). Covers top-level fields only.

fieldGroups.description: Structured field group data. Present only when the record's type defines fieldGroups and the record has matching groupValues. Omitted entirely when no groups have data.

fields.description: Field values for this group entry, keyed by fieldId. Raw JSON values.
